'''shadhusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebrionid|cebrionid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebrionid|cebrionid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shadhusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædhisith|shædhisith]] || [[word:shædhisij|shædhisij]] || [[word:shædhisish|shædhisish]] || [[word:shædhisi|shædhisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhudhusuth|shadhudhusuth]] || [[word:shadhudhusuj|shadhudhusuj]] || [[word:shadhudhusush|shadhudhusush]] || [[word:shadhudhusu|shadhudhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhusuth|shadhusuth]] || [[word:shadhusuj|shadhusuj]] || [[word:shadhusush|shadhusush]] || [[word:shadhusu|shadhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhufsuth|shadhufsuth]] || [[word:shadhufsuj|shadhufsuj]] || [[word:shadhufsush|shadhufsush]] || [[word:shadhufsuf|shadhufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadhusuthu|shadhusuthu]] || [[word:shadhusuju|shadhusuju]] || [[word:shadhusushu|shadhusushu]] || [[word:shadhusuku|shadhusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadhusuth|shadhusuth]] || [[word:shadhusuj|shadhusuj]] || [[word:shadhusush|shadhusush]] || [[word:shadhusu|shadhusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadhusuthul|shadhusuthul]] || [[word:shadhusujul|shadhusujul]] || [[word:shadhusushul|shadhusushul]] || [[word:shadhusukul|shadhusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadhusuthuthu|shadhusuthuthu]] || [[word:shadhusujuju|shadhusujuju]] || [[word:shadhusushushu|shadhusushushu]] || [[word:shadhusuku|shadhusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadhusuthun|shadhusuthun]] || [[word:shadhusujun|shadhusujun]] || [[word:shadhusushun|shadhusushun]] || [[word:shadhusukun|shadhusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadhusuthuoro|shadhusuthuoro]] || [[word:shadhusujuoro|shadhusujuoro]] || [[word:shadhusushuoro|shadhusushuoro]] || [[word:shadhusukuoro|shadhusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
